## Goal
Improve the English-first onboarding flow for external readers.

## Suggested scope
- [ ] tighten the opening summary
- [ ] simplify quickstart wording
- [ ] align terminology across root and detailed READMEs

## Why this matters
The landing page is often the only page a first-time visitor reads.
